The question is asking to determine the number of countries that won a gold medal. In this case, all rows have gold medals, so we'll count the total number of rows.

Explanation: The extracted table lists 14 different nations that won gold medals (Soviet Union, United States, East Germany, Italy, Japan, Hungary, West Germany, United Kingdom, Poland, Yugoslavia, Netherlands, Austria, Bulgaria, and France). Each of these nations is represented in a separate row, indicating they each won at least one gold medal.
